old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-vpei","title":"[codereview-P3] slip_transport_init not thread-safe","description":"lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/slip_transport.c:631\\n\\nThe early return if (ctx-\u003einitialized) is not protected by mutex or atomic. If two threads call init() concurrently, both may pass the check, leading to duplicate thread creation, double mutex inits, etc. Use atomic or add init_mutex. Also, k_mutex_init on already-initialized mutex is undefined per Zephyr (may assert in debug). Discovered in codereview pass 2. Fix as real work (P3 robustness).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T19:02:35.204258817Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T19:02:35.204258817Z"}
